name: trading-prod-full
description: Live Binance BTC-USDT production matrix (~6 USDT). Three rooms + alternating explicit/implicit venue prompts + cancel. WARNING: live writes spend real funds. Teardown runs after suite.

steps: Resolve venue order_ids for harness create_order cases (get_orders fallback)
Cancel only harness-placed BTC-USDT spot orders (by order_ids)
Cancel only harness-placed CROSS / ISOLATED margin orders (by order_ids)
Verify harness client_order_ids are not still open (spot)
Verify harness margin client_order_ids have no open positions
